name: Alstom S.A.
lede: Alstom runs five centers across four Indian cities. Bengaluru, Kolkata, Hyderabad and Vadodara, covering CoE and engineering & design, built over 25 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Alstom office in India. We map five, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Alstom S.A. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Alstom runs 5 verified centers across 4 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Kolkata, Hyderabad, Vadodara), covering CoE and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Software Quality Manager and Site Quality Head Vadodara

about.description: Alstom's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Kolkata, Hyderabad and Vadodara, spanning CoE and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 105 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Alstom operate in India?
faq.a: Alstom operates 5 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Alstom have centers in?
faq.a: Alstom's India footprint includes Bengaluru and 3 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Alstom run in India?
faq.a: Alstom runs CoE and 1 additional center types centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Alstom's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Alstom's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Alstom's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Alstom's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
